title: Dicunoy Set of 2 Milk Butter Warmer Pot, 350ml/650ml Turkish Coffee Pot with Cleaning Brush, Stovetop Chocolate Melting Pan, Cezve Ibrik Briki Greek Arabic Coffee Heater for Maple Syrup, Sauce Heating
features: Premium Quality Coffee Warmer Pot - Dicunoy butter pot is made of 304 stainless steel material. It's rust, high temperature, high pressure resistant and won't deform easily.
Easy to Clean - Our butter warmer pot has a smooth surface, which is easy to clean. It is an ideal choice for those who love making coffee, butter oil, milk or chocolate.

Decent and Practical - Our cute mini coffee pot is designed in elegant shape, it is easy to store with adequate hanging hole on the handle. The capacity is enough for you to make a sufficient amount at one time.

Thoughtful Spout Design - Our butter melting pot comes with a pouring mouth. It is convenient for melted butter, milk, coffee or other warmable liquid. When you are pouring, there is no need to worry about leaking them.

Specification - You will get 2 cute mini coffee pots. Big coffee pot: 7.8cm in top diameter, 9cm in bottom diameter, 11cm in height, capacity about 350ml Mini milk pot 6.5cm in top diameter, 7.6cm in bottom diameter, 9.4cm in height, capacity about 650ml. 1 pc cleaning brush. Do not put it into microwave.
